full_text:
Liu Ye (Ziyang) 劉曄 (子揚)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ye (劉曄), styledZiyang (子揚), was born in Cheng De, Huai Nan Commandery. With other officials, went to Emperor Xian to petition his abdication to Cao Pi. Liu Ye was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wei Kingdom. Liu Ye lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
